name: invoice-saas
description: Minimal NestJS + Next.js invoice app used as an end-to-end Distribute-as-SaaS test harness on the ACE platform.

envVars.name: DATABASE_URL
envVars.label: Postgres connection string
envVars.description: Full postgres:// URL the backend connects to. For Distribute-as-SaaS ACE provisions Cloud SQL and sets this at boot.

envVars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
envVars.label: Stripe secret key
envVars.description: Used to accept payment on generated invoice links.
envVars.howToGetItMd: Sign in to the Stripe dashboard, go to Developers -> API keys, and copy the secret key (starts with `sk_live_` or `sk_test_`).

envVars.name: COMPANY_NAME
envVars.label: Company name printed on invoices
envVars.description: Displayed on every invoice PDF and the invoice web view.

envVars.name: COMPANY_ADDRESS
envVars.label: Company address
envVars.description: Multi-line address. Shown on invoice header.
